name: tyf
description: A faithful apparatus for authorship. Skills install into the Codex agent skills directory (~/.agents/skills/). The author is the source; TYF never becomes the writer.

interface.longDescription: TYF bundles portable authorship skills and a helper discipline so agents preserve source, protect register, propose edits, and keep manuscript writes under explicit author control.
defaultPrompt: Start a new book with TYF, even without a title: set up the workspace, run the first-session start flow, and ask me source questions before drafting.
Import existing material with containment before organizing or drafting.
